title: iOS 26.6 Comes With Two New Features, and One Is Key for iOS 27
summary: Still, if that's you, iOS 27's new Siri will run much more smoothly coming from iOS 26.6 than from iOS 26.5.2. iOS 26.6's other new feature is a new alert , letting you know that you've reached iOS' limit of the number…
